overlapByPackage.note: DOM integration tests validate Alpine registration and reactivity; Playwright validates real focus, layout, and browser APIs. Keep both unless the same public contract is asserted twice.
Browser behavior validated in Playwright; Vitest covers controller/contract layers.
Simulated DOM integration without Playwright — confirm critical browser behavior is not missing from E2E backlog.
